zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Jannett Coney於從1470年1月10日到1471年1月9日出生在英國越可爾米可萊頓時，她的父親John Coney26歲，母親Katherine Tiedkt22歲。她和Sir Lord William F. Bell至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1509年在英國越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Coney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English cony ‘rabbit’ (a back-formation from conies, from Old French conis, plural of conil), perhaps for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way or who wore rabbit skin or who sold rabbits or their skins. One York trader with this name in 1323 was a peleter or furrier.

variants.name: Cunning
meanings: Irish and Scottish (Fife): variant of Scottish or English Conning, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French coning ‘rabbit’, used for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way; perhaps also an occupational name for a furrier. See also Coney .

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Jannett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Jannett Coney was born from 10 January 1470 to 9 January 1471, in Mickleton, Yorkshire, England, her father, John Coney, was 26 and her mother, Katherine Tiedkt, was 22. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Lord William F. Bell. She died in 1509, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Jannett Coney est née du 10 janvier 1470 au 9 janvier 1471, à Mickleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Coney, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine Tiedkt, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Lord William F. Bell. Elle est décédée en 1509, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frances Jannett Coney von 10. Januar 1470 bis 9. Januar 1471 in Mickleton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Coney 26 und ihre Mutter Katherine Tiedkt 22. Sie hatte mit Sir Lord William F. Bell mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1509 in Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Jannett Coneyがから1470年1月10日まで1471年1月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアミックレトンで生まれた時，父John Coneyは26歳，母Katherine Tiedktは22歳であった。彼女はSir Lord William F. Bellとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1509年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Jannett Coney(이)가 1470년 1월 10일부터 1471년 1월 9일까지 영국 요르크실르 믹레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Coney(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Tiedkt(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir Lord William F. Bell(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.
